currentStageTitle: R3 build wave — Stage H (Herald + stance) next, THEN 5e Blood Pact
nextAction: R3 BUILD WAVE in progress (plan: ~/.claude/plans/i-want-to-use-transient-quill.md). Building 3 deferred panel mechanics smallest-first, each re-tuned + 2-seed-locked, then a both-modes re-baseline, then 5e/5f. **Stage T (Forge tolls) DONE & LOCKED** (FORGE_TOLL_COST=1; tolls 0.74/game). **Stage S (Sealed Pledge + Gambit fix) DONE & LOCKED**: named Gambit claimant's pledge sealed (SEALED_CORE_PLEDGE='gambit_claimant' via isPledgeSealed, reusing blood_pact PLEDGE_COMMITTED machinery — a HUMAN-facing feature, sim no-op alone) + the functional lever, a risk-aware seize gate (GAMBIT_SELF_COVER_CARDS=4: gambler only seizes if it can self-defend) + a doom compensator (DOOM_COST_PER_PLAYER 6->5). RESULT (sim-results/s20260622-n40): gambler-free gambit fire 26.7%->14.3% PASS (in 10-20 band — the over-fire open since 5a is FIXED), gambit-win 28.9%->19.0%, SK-win 21.3% PASS (2-seed 20.6%), guards PASS, oaths 6.08/3.39, tolls 0.89, DK-kills 2.35, all_broken 2.3%, 401 tests. RESOLVED the gambit-nerf TODO (GAMBIT_SURCHARGE stays 0.25, no double-nerf). SIDE-EFFECT: per-count ladder now mildly non-monotonic (2p 23.6 / 3p 25.7 / 4p 14.6) from the DOOM_COST_PER_PLAYER compensator — pooled in band + guards hold; accept or restore monotonicity later. **NEXT = Stage H (Herald + political/martial stance, MVP — the BIG re-tune):** PieceType 'herald'; per-player handLimit (sequencer Dawn HAND_LIMIT->p.handLimit); executeRecruit (Herald: +HERALD_HAND_BONUS hand / -HERALD_COMBAT_PENALTY fighter = political vs martial axis, sticky stance) + executeParley (non-card pushback vs the dark) + 'PARLEY' action + piece-selector march; AI heraldAffinity/parleyBias; herald metrics + political/martial parity guard; tune-herald.mjs (expect SK-win down + rescues lower — budget the largest re-tune). THEN Stage R (both-modes re-baseline) + 5e (Blood Pact accusation) + 5f (final lock + §9 doc + amend ROADMAP §2 open-pledge decision: sealed-claimant ships). (rescues ~0.89 pooled 2-4 STRUCTURALLY CAPPED, escalated; Herald may lower it — decide at Stage H.)

Stage H target seams: src/v2/types.ts (PieceType 'herald' + PlayerState handLimit/stance/heraldNodeId), src/v2/sequencer.ts (Dawn HAND_LIMIT->p.handLimit), src/v2/actions.ts (executeRecruit/new executeParley/piece-selector march), src/v2/commands.ts ('PARLEY'), src/v2/ai-player.ts (heraldAffinity/parleyBias)

sim-results/s20260622-n40/REPORT.md (latest LOCKED: SK-win 21.3%, gambit-noG 14.3%, oaths 6.08/3.39, tolls 0.89); PRIOR docs DESIGN-V2-OATHS / RESCUE-ECONOMY / DARK-ENGAGEMENT / FOCUS-GROUP-R3 / ALGORITHM §9.1
invariants: All mutation goes through applyCommand (src/v2/reducer.ts) — no direct state mutation elsewhere
No Math.random / Date.now / any in src/v2 — all RNG via SeededRandom (ALGORITHM §7)
AI decisions must be pure f(state, seed) (ALGORITHM §7.9) — required for reproducibility

Layer B (blood_pact) only: pledges emit PLEDGE_COMMITTED (concealed) not PLEDGE_SUBMITTED; real tiers go to suspicionLog; the traitor forfeits the doom_complete win iff bloodPactExposed. Competitive mode behavior is unchanged.
gotchas: `npm test` includes ~50 RED v1 tests by design (they anchor v1) — use `npm run test:v2` for the v2 suite
vitest output buffers when piped through `tail` — redirect to a file, or use the JSON reporter (verify.mjs does)
Run `npm run verify` to (re)populate this block; never hand-edit lastVerified/dirty

ACTION pointer quirk: after the LAST player in turnOrder exhausts actions, advanceActivePlayer leaves activePlayerIndex ON that player (turnOrderPosition === turnOrder.length). Any per-player action loop must ALSO stop on actionsRemaining===0, not just the index — else it re-enters a 0-action player (runAITurn handles this).

The v2 UI lives in src/ui-v2 (entry index.html → src/ui-v2/main.ts; old v1 harness preserved at index-v1.html). It is OUTSIDE the verify lint/test scope (src/v2 tests/v2), but tsc --noEmit covers all of src/ so it must typecheck. Validate UI changes with `npm run dev` (or `npx vite build`); the headless session driver has logic coverage in tests/v2/ui-session.test.ts.
openRisks: STAGE-5a DIAGNOSTIC FINDINGS (the pooled numbers hid these — sim-results/sample/REPORT.md): (1) SK-win is WILDLY uneven by player count — 2p 29.2% / 3p 11.6% / 4p 1.9% (pooled 14.3%). The dark is nearly unwinnable at 4p and too strong at 2p → the #1 5c fix is the doomCost() PLAYER-COUNT SCALING (currently base*playerCount/4: more pledgers block far more easily at 4p). (2) DK-kills = 0.00/game — players NEVER engage the dark's Death Knights (DKs sit on outer seams players don't visit), so pushback/grudge/heroic mechanics are DORMANT; consider relevant in 5d. (3) gambler-FREE gambit fire 27.2% (above the 10-20% band — driven by opportunist/aggressor gambitAmbition, not just the gambler archetype) → may need a SMALL gambit nerf after all. (4) breaks 0.73/game but conditional-rescue 13.4% → both more breaks AND more rescue-uptake needed for 2-4 rescues. Pledge full-block 40%, mean ashed 6.09.

TRUSTWORTHY POST-4g SWEEP FINDINGS (4200 games — sim-results/sample/REPORT.md): SK win 14.3% pooled (but see the 5a per-count finding below — it's the scaling that's broken, not just the level), rescues 0.10/game (under-fires), BP accusation accuracy 20.5%. GOOD: no dominant strategy, free-riding NOT rewarded. Gambit: the earlier 'OVERPOWERED' aggregate alarm is a stress-archetype confound, but 5a's gambler-free measure (27%) is mildly above band — a small nerf may be warranted, NOT the 49%-driven over-nerf.

The anti-free-rider reward (§4.2 step 5, Stage 3f) MEASURES as working across both pre- and post-4g sweeps (winners don't pledge less) — but PLEDGE_SHIELD_AMOUNT / PLEDGE_FAVOR_GRUDGE_REDUCTION are still placeholder [TUNABLE]; confirm it holds after Stage-5 retuning.

DATA-TRUST CAVEAT (4g notes): combat commits are now value-aware but the ENGINE auto-decides them (COMBAT_COMMIT_MAX, RAID_DEFENSE_MARGIN) rather than a per-policy choice; the Last Stand is also engine-auto. Good enough for balance signal, but a future improvement is to make combat commits a policy decision. The PUSHBACK(1)==DAWN_BLIGHT_ADVANCE(1) relationship can let the front stall (tunables.ts note) — a Stage-5 tuning call.

Blood Pact accusation tuning (AUDIT_COST, ACCUSATION_* penalties/cooldown, SUSPICION_LOG_ROUNDS, TRAITOR_EXPOSED_WOUNDS) is placeholder — must be balanced in Stage 5 so accusation is neither spammed nor never-fired.

Stage 3f effect-table / Last-Stand / rescue-debt magnitudes (SURGE_SPREAD_MULT, DK_MARCH_DISTANCE, GAMBIT_ADJACENT_STRIKE_MULT, RESCUE_DEBT_MIN_PLEDGE, the deterministic Last-Stand 'fight if you can win' rule) are reasonable defaults, not balanced — Stage-5 sim must validate them.

Archetype AI (Stage 4b) now pursues RAID/RESCUE/Gambit; Last Stand remains engine-auto and Audit/Accusation are NOT yet in the AI action loop (wired in 4f for Blood Pact) — the Stage-4 competitive sweep under-exercises the BP deduction paths until then.
